description:
Ordinal Punks consist of a collection of 10,000 unique characters of 24x24 pixels. No Punk is identical to the previous one. They were generated algorithmically, inspired by the London punk aesthetic of the 70s and the Cyberpunk movement.

Types of Characters

Although the majority are humans, the collection contains rarities that make prices skyrocket:

• 6,039 Men and 3,840 Women.

• 88 Zombies (green skin).

• 24 Monkeys (Apes).

• 9 Aliens (light blue skin) — the most coveted on the market.
name: Ordinal Punks
